requirement_topic.en: Labelling — Azerbaijani-Language Requirements for Respiratory PPE
requirement_topic.zh: 标签——呼吸PPE的阿塞拜疆语要求
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤——呼吸PPE的亞塞拜然語要求

summary.en: Products sold in Azerbaijan must carry labelling in the Azerbaijani language (Latin script, as Azerbaijan uses the Latin-based Azerbaijani alphabet). Required labelling elements for respiratory PPE typically include: product name and type designation; manufacturer name and address; applicable standard reference (AZS or GOST standard number); protection class / filtration grade (e.g. equivalent of FFP1/FFP2/FFP3 or KP1/KP2/KP3 under GOST); conformity certification number (from the national conformity certificate); instructions for use and storage conditions in Azerbaijani; expiry date or production date; country of origin. Chinese-only or Russian-only labelling is not sufficient for the Azerbaijan retail or B2B market — Azerbaijani-language labelling is required. Supplementary Russian labelling may be accepted in practice (GOST-legacy), but Azerbaijani is the mandatory national language. Confirm current labelling requirements with the importer or AZSTAND.
summary.zh: 在阿塞拜疆销售的产品须附有阿塞拜疆语标签（拉丁字母，阿塞拜疆采用拉丁字母体系）。呼吸PPE的必要标签内容通常包括：产品名称及类型标识；制造商名称及地址；适用标准参考（AZS或GOST标准编号）；防护等级/过滤级别（如GOST体系下的FFP1/FFP2/FFP3或KP1/KP2/KP3等效版）；合规认证编号（来自国家合格证书）；阿塞拜疆语使用及储存说明；有效期或生产日期；原产地。仅有中文或俄文标签不足以满足阿塞拜疆零售或B2B市场要求——须使用阿塞拜疆语标签。实践中可能接受附加俄语标签（GOST传统），但阿塞拜疆语为强制性国家语言。请向进口商或AZSTAND确认当前标签要求。
summary.zht: 在亞塞拜然銷售的產品須附有亞塞拜然語標籤（拉丁字母，亞塞拜然採用拉丁字母體系）。呼吸PPE的必要標籤內容通常包括：產品名稱及類型標識；製造商名稱及地址；適用標準參考（AZS或GOST標準編號）；防護等級/過濾級別（如GOST體系下的FFP1/FFP2/FFP3或KP1/KP2/KP3等效版）；合規認證編號（來自國家合格證書）；亞塞拜然語使用及儲存說明；有效期或生產日期；原產地。僅有中文或俄文標籤不足以滿足亞塞拜然零售或B2B市場要求——須使用亞塞拜然語標籤。實踐中可能接受附加俄語標籤（GOST傳統），但亞塞拜然語為強制性國家語言。請向進口商或AZSTAND確認當前標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND labelling requirements for regulated goods sold in Azerbaijan
GOST 12.4.191 (adopted) — marking requirements for filtering half-masks
Azerbaijan State Language Law — Azerbaijani (Latin script) as mandatory national language for product labelling

summary.en: Chinese domestic labelling for GB 2626-2019 respiratory PPE must be in Simplified Chinese. Required elements include: product name; standard number (GB 2626-2019); protection class (KN90 or KN95); manufacturer name, address, and CCC certificate number; production date and shelf life; instructions for use in Chinese. Export packaging must be relabelled for Azerbaijan with Azerbaijani-language content — Chinese-language labels do not satisfy Azerbaijan market requirements.
summary.zh: 依据GB 2626-2019，中国国内呼吸PPE标签须使用简体中文。必要内容包括：产品名称；标准编号（GB 2626-2019）；防护等级（KN90或KN95）；制造商名称、地址及CCC证书编号；生产日期及保质期；中文使用说明。出口包装须为阿塞拜疆市场重新贴标，加入阿塞拜疆语内容——中文标签不满足阿塞拜疆市场要求。
summary.zht: 依據GB 2626-2019，中國國內呼吸PPE標籤須使用簡體中文。必要內容包括：產品名稱；標準編號（GB 2626-2019）；防護等級（KN90或KN95）；製造商名稱、地址及CCC證書編號；生產日期及保質期；中文使用說明。出口包裝須為亞塞拜然市場重新貼標，加入亞塞拜然語內容——中文標籤不滿足亞塞拜然市場要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — marking and labelling requirements for KN95 / non-powered particle respirators
GB/T 191 — Packaging — Pictorial marking for handling of goods (supplementary)

gap.en: Chinese-language labelling does not satisfy Azerbaijan requirements. Exporters must: (1) produce Azerbaijani-language labelling (Latin script) covering all mandatory elements; (2) reference the applicable AZS / GOST standard number (not GB 2626); (3) include the Azerbaijan national conformity certificate number; (4) include Azerbaijani instructions for use; (5) confirm with the local importer or AZSTAND whether Russian-language supplementary labelling is also required or acceptable in practice. Do not assume Russian labelling is sufficient — Azerbaijani is the national language and required for consumer-facing products.
gap.zh: 中文标签不满足阿塞拜疆要求。出口商须：（1）制作涵盖所有强制要素的阿塞拜疆语标签（拉丁字母）；（2）标注适用AZS/GOST标准编号（而非GB 2626）；（3）注明阿塞拜疆国家合格证书编号；（4）附上阿塞拜疆语使用说明；（5）向当地进口商或AZSTAND确认实践中是否还需要或可接受俄语附加标签。不得假设俄语标签已足够——阿塞拜疆语是国家语言，面向消费者的产品须使用阿塞拜疆语。
gap.zht: 中文標籤不滿足亞塞拜然要求。出口商須：（1）製作涵蓋所有強制要素的亞塞拜然語標籤（拉丁字母）；（2）標注適用AZS/GOST標準編號（而非GB 2626）；（3）注明亞塞拜然國家合格證書編號；（4）附上亞塞拜然語使用說明；（5）向當地進口商或AZSTAND確認實踐中是否還需要或可接受俄語附加標籤。不得假設俄語標籤已足夠——亞塞拜然語是國家語言，面向消費者的產品須使用亞塞拜然語。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Azerbaijani-language labelling required for products sold in Azerbaijan; conformity certificate number must appear on label
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Simplified Chinese labelling required for domestic market under GB 2626-2019; export labelling must be adapted per destination-country requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijani-language (Latin script) labelling is mandatory for products sold in Azerbaijan. Chinese-only labelling does not comply. Exporters must relabel with Azerbaijani-language content referencing the applicable AZS/GOST standard and national conformity certificate number. Verified: false — confirm labelling element requirements with AZSTAND or a local regulatory consultant before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿塞拜疆销售的产品须强制使用阿塞拜疆语（拉丁字母）标签。仅有中文标签不合规。出口商须以阿塞拜疆语内容重新贴标，注明适用AZS/GOST标准及国家合格证书编号。已核验：否——出货前请向AZSTAND或当地法规顾问确认标签要素要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在亞塞拜然銷售的產品須強制使用亞塞拜然語（拉丁字母）標籤。僅有中文標籤不合規。出口商須以亞塞拜然語內容重新貼標，注明適用AZS/GOST標準及國家合格證書編號。已核驗：否——出貨前請向AZSTAND或當地法規顧問確認標籤要素要求。
